AI-native platform that generates documentation from code, scores quality in real time, routes low confidence content to expert review, and delivers measurable ROI for enterprise teams.

AI-native documentation engine

AI-Native Documentation Engine

Three revolutionary AI engines working together to transform how teams create, validate, and scale technical documentation.

AI Documentation Generator

Automatically converts codebases into comprehensive documentation with parameter extraction, usage examples, and multi-format export.

  • ✓Intelligent code analysis
  • ✓Multi-language support
  • ✓Export to any format

Documentation Quality Scorer

Advanced scoring system analyzing readability, inclusivity, structure, and technical accuracy with actionable recommendations.

  • ✓Multi-dimensional scoring
  • ✓Confidence indicators
  • ✓Actionable recommendations

Human-in-the-Loop Review

Low-confidence content routes to expert reviewers so the platform improves over time without blocking engineering velocity.

  • ✓Smart routing system
  • ✓Expert reviewer network
  • ✓Quality assurance workflow

Use cases

Built For Every Team That Ships Code.

Whether you’re a solo OSS maintainer or a 10,000-person enterprise, TechniDox adapts to how your team creates and maintains documentation.

Open source teams

Ship docs as fast as you ship code

Democratize contributions with micro-tasks, voice input, and mentorship matching. Keep your community engaged with progress systems instead of chores.

  • ✓78% less burden on maintainers
  • ✓Non-technical contributors via micro-tasks
  • ✓Gamified streaks keep contributors returning

Engineering enablement

Onboard developers 2.3x faster

Connect TechniDox to CI/CD and auto-generate docs on every merge. Quality gates catch regressions before they hit production.

  • ✓CI/CD quality gates prevent doc regressions
  • ✓Auto-generated docs on every merge
  • ✓34% fewer “how do I…” interruptions

Platform teams

Documentation that scales with your APIs

Generate API reference docs, SDK guides, and integration playbooks automatically from the codebase while catching drift in real time.

  • ✓Auto-synced API reference on every deploy
  • ✓Multi-format export: OpenAPI, MDX, HTML
  • ✓Confidence alerts flag doc drift instantly

Enterprise documentation

Documentation your auditors will approve

Meet ISO, SOC2, and internal compliance requirements with audit trails, version control, and executive ROI dashboards.

  • ✓ISO 27001 and SOC2 compliance reporting
  • ✓Full audit trail for every doc change
  • ✓Executive ROI dashboards out of the box
AI-native documentation engine

Community-Driven Improvement At Scale

Democratize documentation contributions with gamified workflows, micro-tasks, mentorship matching, and peer validation systems that keep contributors engaged long-term.

Gamified Contributions

Streak tracking, impact badges, and achievement systems that reward quality contributions and retain community members.

Micro-Contribution Architecture

Complex tasks broken into 5 to 10 minute contributions so more people can help without deep codebase context.

Mentorship Matching

AI-powered pairing connects experienced contributors with newcomers to accelerate both throughput and knowledge transfer.

Peer Validation Network

Review, edit, and approve workflows improve model quality over time through community-driven quality signals.
